name: Fix Verification Run
persona: A PM/builder maintaining a portfolio experiment repo who needs repeatable, diagnosable generation runs that don’t truncate or degrade under token limits
problem_statement: Multi-file project generation can silently truncate or genericize content to stay under 8192 tokens, producing incomplete artifacts that look valid until review
artifact_type: local web UI + Node runner that generates and validates a multi-file project pack with token-budget diagnostics
